title: FDA Microstructure Agent Output
description: Structured JSON the microstructure specialist agent emits for one fda_regulatory_events row. Validated by modal_workers/shared/fda_agent_validator.py before any DB write.

options_liquidity_score.description: Agent's 0..5 read on options liquidity at the event window. Used by compose_features ONLY when Polygon's score is null.

implied_move_pct.description: Agent's straddle-implied move estimate. Used ONLY when Polygon straddle is unavailable. Negative is invalid (move magnitudes are non-negative).

borrow_cost_bps.description: Borrow cost in basis points (informational; not folded into score). Null when not available.

crowding_score.description: 0..5: short interest, 13F overlap, sell-side pile-on. 5=very crowded.

event_window_open_interest.description: Total open interest summed across contracts expiring in the event window.
